subject: MarR

facts.label: Escherichia coli AcrAB-TolC with MarR mutations conferring resistance to ciprofloxacin and tetracycline
facts.desc: MarR is a repressor of the mar operon marRAB, thus regulating the expression of marA, the activator of multidrug efflux pump AcrAB.

facts.label: marR
facts.desc: MarR is a repressor of the mar operon marRAB, thus regulating the expression of marA, the activator of multidrug efflux pump AcrAB.

facts.label: Escherichia coli CpxR
facts.desc: The Escherichia coli CpxR/CpxA system responds to general periplasmic stress and has been used as a model two-component system for transcription regulation in bacteria. CpxR/CpxA system facilitates Salmonella and E. coli resistance to cationic antimicrobial peptides.The CpxR/CpxA system can activate transcription of marRAB operon, thus facilitating multidrug-resistant regulator to enhance expression of TolC-dependent tripartite multidrug transporters.

facts.label: antibiotic-resistant emb arabinosyltransferase
facts.desc: Known antibiotic-resistant variants of emb arabinosyltransferases, primarily in Mycobacterium and conferring resistance to ethambutol through point mutation.

facts.label: antibiotic-resistant rpsL
facts.desc: Ribosomal protein S12 stabilizes the highly conserved pseudoknot structure formed by 16S rRNA. Amino acid substitutions in RpsL affect the higher-order structure of 16S rRNA and confer antibiotic resistance.

CpxR/CpxA system facilitates Salmonella and E. coli resistance to cationic antimicrobial peptides.The CpxR/CpxA system can activate transcription of marRAB operon, thus facilitating multidrug-resistant regulator to enhance expression of TolC-dependent tripartite multidrug transporters.

CARD/ARO ARO:3003419 — antibiotic-resistant rpsL: Ribosomal protein S12 stabilizes the highly conserved pseudoknot structure formed by 16S rRNA. Amino acid substitutions in RpsL affect the higher-order structure of 16S rRNA and confer antibiotic resistance.
